content:

About Organization

The State Bank of India is a leading public sector bank in India. It provides a wide range of banking services to its customers.

The bank has a strong presence in India and abroad, with a large network of branches and ATMs.


About the Programme

The SBI Assistant Manager Law and Deputy Manager Law Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for law graduates. The programme aims to recruit talented and skilled law professionals to work with the bank.

The programme is open to Indian citizens with a law degree and relevant experience. The selected candidates will be appointed as Assistant Manager Law or Deputy Manager Law in the bank.
